violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fans in all walk-in coolers, meat dept, produce dept need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Wall behind 3 comp sink in deli needs repair, dry wall showing -Ceiling in deli needs repair. - Floor in deli needs repair, wood is cut, uncleanable.
